claimText: The Ministry of Environment, Forests, and Climate Change (MoEFCC) is responsible for announcing the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement.
evidenceExcerpt: The Ministry of Environment, Forests, and Climate Change (MoEFCC) announced the National Designated Authority (NDA) for the implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement (2015)
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal ministry for the NDA under Article 6.
distractorHooks: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

claimText: The implementation of Article 6 of the Paris Agreement in India is notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
evidenceExcerpt: The implementation is notified under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the parent legislation for Article 6 implementation in India.
distractorHooks: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981
